title: ReflectMT: Internalizing Reflection for Efficient and High-Quality Machine Translation
summary: Recent years have witnessed growing interest in applying Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) to Machine Translation (MT). Existing approaches predominantly adopt a "think-first-then-translate" paradigm. Although explicit reasoning trajectories...
